title: Monthly Close and Review
summary: A monthly cadence for closing your books, reviewing the P&L, and updating your financial forecast.

steps.title: Reconcile bank accounts
steps.description: Match every transaction in your accounting software to your bank statements. Flag anything unrecognised.

steps.title: Review and categorise expenses
steps.description: Check that all expenses are in the correct categories. Look for miscategorised items, duplicate charges, subscriptions you no longer use.

steps.title: Confirm revenue recognition
steps.description: Ensure all revenue is recorded in the correct month. For subscriptions, check MRR is accurate. For projects, check milestones are billed.

steps.title: Generate and review P&L
steps.description: Pull the P&L for the month. Compare to last month and to budget. Flag any line item that changed by more than 20%.

steps.title: Update the forecast
steps.description: Based on actual results, update your revenue and expense forecast for the next 3 months.

whenToImplement: From month 1 of the business. Even if you only have 10 transactions, the habit matters.
delegationNotes: Reconciliation and categorisation can be delegated to a bookkeeper (~$500-1000/month). The founder should always review the P&L and update the forecast.
automationNotes: Bank feeds automate transaction import. Receipt scanning (Dext, Hubdoc) automates expense capture. Dashboard reporting can be automated in Xero/QuickBooks.
